name: Health Grain Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. In a large bowl, mix together water, bread flour, whole-wheat flour, nonfat dried milk, salt, honey, applesauce, grated carrots, raisins, sunflower seeds, bran flakes, wheat germ, and yeast until well combined.
3. Shape the dough into a loaf and place it in a greased baking pan.
4. Bake for 30-35 minutes or until golden brown and crusty.
5. Remove from oven and let cool before slicing.
